title: ODS-E Alarm Frequency Profile
description: Derived alarm frequency analytics for a specific equipment-alarm pair, computed from SCADA alarm logs and enriched with maintenance context

alarm_code.description: SCADA or monitoring system alarm code

source_equipment_id.description: Native equipment identifier in the originating SCADA or monitoring system

count_7d.description: Number of alarm occurrences in the trailing 7-day window

count_30d.description: Number of alarm occurrences in the trailing 30-day window

count_90d.description: Number of alarm occurrences in the trailing 90-day window

mean_time_between_alarms_hours.description: Average time between consecutive occurrences of this alarm in hours

escalation_rate.description: Ratio of count_7d normalized to weekly rate vs count_30d normalized to weekly rate. Values greater than 1.0 indicate accelerating alarm frequency.

prior_wo_count_same_alarm.description: Number of historical work orders linked to this alarm code on this equipment

prior_resolution.description: Resolution status of the most recent work order for this alarm on this equipment
